 "data": "graph TB
 subgraph Presentación[\"Capa de Presentación (Http/)\"]
 C[Controllers]
 R[Requests]
 Res[Resources/Inertia Props]
 end

 subgraph Aplicacion[\"Capa de Aplicación (Application/)\"]
 CMD[Commands]
 QRY[Queries]
 HDL[Handlers]
 DTO[DTOs]
 EVH[EventHandlers]
 EV[Events de Aplicación]
 end

 subgraph Dominio[\"Capa de Dominio (Domains/)\"]
 AGG[Aggregates]
 VO[Value Objects]
 DEV[Domain Events]
 CON[Contracts / Interfaces]
 EXC[Domain Exceptions]
 end

 subgraph Infraestructura[\"Capa de Infraestructura (Infrastructure/ + Shared/Infrastructure/)\"]
 REP[Eloquent Repositories]
 QEX[Query Executors]
 BUS[Buses Laravel]
 SRV[Laravel Services]
 end

 Presentación --> Aplicacion
 Aplicacion --> Dominio
 Infraestructura -->|implementa| Dominio",
